events.name: Phoenix Suns at Los Angeles Lakers

headlines.description: — Austin Reaves scored 20 points and Bronny James added eight while the Los Angeles Lakers lost their preseason opener 103-81 to the Phoenix Suns on Friday night with LeBron James and Luka Doncic sitting out.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lakers lose their preseason opener 103-81 to Suns with LeBron James, Luka Doncic sitting out
